comments: Actively operated; the same axe-core engine powers our published methodology and dataset of 2.6M website scans: https://www.wcagrepair.com/research/web-accessibility-statistics
features: Free online accessibility checker: enter a URL to scan a site for machine-detectable WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA issues — color contrast, alt text, form labels, target size, ARIA and more — via the axe-core engine, with severity-rated findings in plain language. No signup; optional paid AI fix guide.
title: WCAG Repair Accessibility Checker
